extensionDesc.message: Seamlessly upgrade legacy website authentication with enterprise-grade Passkey and WebAuthn security.

errorVaultNotFound.message: Error: Vault not found for this website.

errorNoUsernameProvided.message: Please enter your email or username first to use your Passkey.

setupGuidance.message: First time setup: Please enter your email and password to log in normally. A secure Passkey vault will be created automatically!
